traitDescription.summoner:
Deals <@ba.kw>Arts damage</>
Can use <@ba.kw>Summons</> in battles

traitDescription.physician1: Restores the HP of allies and ignores the <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time

traitDescription.fearless1: Blocks 1 enemy and ignores the <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time

traitDescription.executor1: Does not attack and ignores the <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time

traitDescription.fastshot1: Attacks aerial enemies first and ignores <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time

traitDescription.bombarder: Attacks deal <@ba.kw>two instances</> of Physical damage to <@ba.kw>ground</> enemies in a small area (The second instance is a shockwave that has half the normal ATK)

traitDescription.bombarder1: Attacks deal Physical Damage <@ba.kw>twice</> to <@ba.kw>ground</> enemies in a small radius (second time is an aftershock dealing half ATK in damage), and ignores the <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time

traitDescription.bard: Does not attack but continuously restores the <@ba.kw>HP</> of all allies within range (the HP restored per second is equal to 10% of self ATK). Self is unaffected by <$ba.inspire>Inspiration</>

traitDescription.bard1: Does not attack but continuously restores the <@ba.kw>HP</> of all allies within range (the HP restored per second is equal to 10% of self ATK). This unit is unaffected by <$ba.inspire>Inspiration</>, and ignores the <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time.

traitDescription.protector1: Blocks 3 enemies and ignores <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time

traitDescription.ritualist: Attacks deal <@ba.kw>Arts damage</>, and can inflict <@ba.kw>Elemental Injury</>

traitDescription.ritualist1: Attacks deal <@ba.kw>Arts damage</> and can inflict <@ba.kw>Elemental Injury</>. Not affected by <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time.

traitDescription.pioneer1: Blocks 2 enemies and ignores <@ba.kw>Deployment Limit</>, but has a long Redeployment Time

traitDescription.agent: Has <@ba.kw>reduced</> Redeployment Time, can use ranged attacks

traitDescription.charger: Obtain 1 DP after this unit defeats an enemy; Refunds the original DP Cost when retreated

traitDescription.bearer: Cannot block enemies during the skill duration

traitDescription.counsellor: Blocks 2 enemies, and can support allies in the Deployment Waiting Zone

traitDescription.tactician: This unit can designate one <@ba.kw>Tactical Point</> within attack range to call Reinforcements; ATK is increased to 150% when attacking enemies blocked by Reinforcements

traitDescription.hammer: Attacks deal <@ba.kw>50%</> ATK as <@ba.kw>AOE</> Physical damage to enemies around the target.

traitDescription.instructor: Has <@ba.kw>extended</> attack range; When attacking enemies not blocked by self, increase ATK to 120%

traitDescription.librator: Normally does not attack and has 0 Block; When skill is inactive, ATK gradually increases up to <@ba.kw>+{atk:0%}</> over <@ba.kw>{max_stack_cnt}</> seconds. ATK is reset when the skill ends

traitDescription.lord: Can launch <@ba.kw>Ranged Attacks</> that deal 80% of normal ATK

traitDescription.mercenary: Có thể tiêu hao [[DP|DP]] để cường hóa khả năng chiến đấu.

traitDescription.primguard: Blocks 2 enemies, and can inflict <@ba.kw>Elemental damage</>

traitDescription.reaper: Cannot be healed by allies; Attacks deal <@ba.kw>AOE Damage</>; Recovers <@ba.kw>50</> HP for every enemy hit during attacks, up to Block count

traitDescription.musha: Can't be healed by other units. Recovers <@ba.kw>{value}</> self HP every time this operator attacks an enemy

traitDescription.artsprotector: Normal attacks deal Arts damage while the skill is active

traitDescription.duelist: Only restores SP when blocking enemies

traitDescription.fortress: When not blocking enemies, prioritizes dealing <@ba.kw>ranged AoE</> Physical damage

traitDescription.guardian: Can heal allies by using skill(s)

traitDescription.primprotector: Blocks 3 enemies, and can inflict Elemental Injury.

traitDescription.shotprotector: Blocks 3 enemies and attacks from long range.

traitDescription.longrange: Prioritizes attacking the enemy with <@ba.kw>lowest DEF</> within range first

traitDescription.hunter: Attacks consume Ammo to increase ATK to <@ba.kw>120%</>; While not attacking, Ammo will be slowly reloaded (max capacity <@ba.kw>{value}</>).

traitDescription.loopshooter: Can only attack while holding a <@ba.kw>boomerang projectile</> (projectile takes time to return)

traitDescription.skybreaker: [[Cất cánh|liftoff]] sau khi được triển khai và chỉ tấn công kẻ địch trên không. Khi kích hoạt kỹ năng sẽ hạ cánh và đòn tấn công gây <@ba.kw>sát thương vật lý diện rộng</>.

traitDescription.reaperrange: Attacks <@ba.kw>all enemies</> within range, and deals 150% damage to enemies in the row directly in front of this unit.

traitDescription.blastcaster: Deals <@ba.kw>AOE Arts damage in a long line</>

traitDescription.chain: Attacks deal <@ba.kw>Arts</> damage and jump between <@ba.kw>{attack@max_target}</> enemies. Each jump deals 15% less damage and inflicts a brief <$ba.sluggish>Slow</>

traitDescription.chain_2: Thời gian làm chậm là 0.5 giây.

traitDescription.funnel: Controls a <@ba.kw>Drone</> to deal <@ba.kw>Arts</> damage to an enemy; When the Drone continuously attacks the same enemy, its damage will increase (up to 110% of the operator's ATK)

traitDescription.funnel_2: ATK của Drone = 20% ATK của OP, và mỗi lần tấn công cùng 1 mục tiêu sẽ tăng 15% ATK. Nếu thay đổi mục tiêu thì ATK về lại 20%.

traitDescription.mystic: Attacks deal <@ba.kw>Arts damage</>; When unable to find a target, attacks can be <@ba.kw>stored up</> and fired all at once (Up to 3 charges)

traitDescription.phalanx: Normally <@ba.kw>does not attack</>, but has <@ba.kw>greatly increased</> DEF and RES; When skill is active, attacks deal <@ba.kw>AoE Arts damage</>

traitDescription.primcaster: Attacks deal <@ba.kw>Arts damage</>, and can inflict <@ba.kw>Elemental Damage</>

traitDescription.soulcaster: Deals <@ba.kw>Arts damage</>; Can create <@ba.kw>Summons</> by defeating enemies, and can attack enemies blocked by these <@ba.kw>Summons</>

traitDescription.chainhealer: Restores HP of allies, bouncing between <@ba.kw>3</> allies. Healing reduced by 25% per bounce.

traitDescription.incantationmedic: Đòn tấn công gây <@ba.kw>sát thương phép</> và hồi HP cho 1 đồng minh trong phạm vi tấn công bằng 50% sát thương gây ra.

traitDescription.healer: Attacks deal Arts damage and heal the HP of an ally within Attack Range for <@ba.kw>{heal_scale:0%}</> of the damage dealt

traitDescription.wandermedic: Restores the HP of allied units and recovers <@ba.dt.element>Elemental Injury</> by 50% of ATK (can recover <@ba.dt.element>Elemental Injury</> of unhurt allied units)

traitDescription.blessing: Deals <@ba.kw>Arts damage</>; When skill is active, attacks instead restore the HP of allies (heal amount is equal to 75% of ATK)

traitDescription.craftsman: Blocks 2 enemies; Can use <Support Devices> in battles

traitDescription.slower: Deals <@ba.kw>Arts damage</> and <$ba.sluggish>Slows</> the target for a short time

traitDescription.slower_2: Thời gian làm chậm là 0.8 giây.

traitDescription.alchemist: Can throw <@ba.kw>Alchemical Units</> to assist in combat

traitDescription.stalker:
Deals Damage to <@ba.kw>all targets</> within range
50% chance to dodge Physical and Arts attacks and is less likely to be <@ba.kw>targeted</> by enemies

traitDescription.dollkeeper: Does not retreat upon receiving lethal damage, instead swaps to a <Substitute> (Substitute has 0 Block). Swaps back to the original after 20 seconds

traitDescription.geek_2: Mất 1% HP tối đa mỗi giây và không giảm dưới 1 máu.

traitDescription.hookmaster:
Can <@ba.kw>Shift</> enemies by using skills
Can be deployed on Ranged Tiles

traitDescription.merchant: Has <@ba.kw>reduced</> Redeployment Time, but <@ba.kw>DP Cost</> is not refunded upon retreating; While deployed, <@ba.kw>3 DP</> are consumed every 3 seconds (automatically retreats without sufficient DP)

traitDescription.pusher:
Can attack <@ba.kw>all blocked enemies</>
Can be deployed on Ranged Tiles

traitDescription.skywalker: After <$ba.liftoff>Taking Off</>, can block 2 flying enemies

traitDescription.traper: Can use traps to assist in combat, but traps cannot be placed <@ba.kw>on tiles already occupied by an enemy</>
